text.message: It’s over, I have the high ground.
Guys I’m just saying Star Wars quotes and hoping you respond back with another one
I have a bad feeling about this
I have brought peace, justice, and security to my new empire
If you’re not with me, then you’re my enemy
My power has doubled since the last time we met count.
Guys this late game is gonna be really hard for me to close out especially if someone else takes army
OK it’s only late game for you lol.
You’re super close and nobody else is.
I know, just saying this live change very quickly I. Catan
Game changes quickly * typing is hard on mobile
Green wins if they pull more devs and take army now
You have 8 points and 10 cards and army.  Respectfully.  🤐
Just pointing things out. I realize I’m ahead but green can easily pull more devs and change the game
Yes I’m talking to the whole table
I were objectively equal now lol
Blue u really need to take road now
Thanks for the gg u guys made a good comeback
Have a great week u guys
